identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a top 1% premium AI news app with anti-standard design patterns.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix swiss grid precision with cyberpunk atmosphere.
Emotion First: The app should feel 'fast' and 'intelligent'.
Content is King: The news card is the hero. Everything else fades away.
Dark Mode Only: Embrace the void. Deepest blacks, glowing accents.

platform_constraints.styling: StyleSheet.create() only. NO CSS files. NO className strings.
platform_constraints.icons: Lucide React Native (lucide-react-native) or Expo Vector Icons

vertical_swipe_feed.description: The core experience. Full screen news cards that snap vertically.
vertical_swipe_feed.implementation: Use `react-native-pager-view` with `orientation='vertical'` for native performance. Wrap content in Reanimated views for entrance animations.

bento_grid_mobile.description: For Categories/Discover screen. A dense grid of tappable areas.
bento_grid_mobile.implementation: Flexbox with wrap. Items have `width: '48%'` and `marginBottom: 16`.

NewsCard.specs: Full screen height. Image takes top 50%. Gradient overlay from bottom up. Text sits on bottom 50%.
NewsCard.interactions: Double tap to bookmark (heart animation). Long press to share.

Button.specs: TouchableOpacity with Reanimated scale on press. LinearGradient background for primary actions.

TabBar.specs: Floating glass bar at bottom. `BlurView` with tint='dark'. Icons only, no labels for minimalism.

Header.specs: Absolute positioned top bar. Transparent background. Logo left, Settings right.

assets.icons_usage: Use Lucide React Native. Stroke width 1.5px for elegance. Size 24px standard.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Initialize Expo project structure if not present (app/, components/, constants/).
4. Build the `NewsCard` component with `ImageBackground` and `LinearGradient` overlay.
6. Ensure `SafeAreaView` is used correctly so content doesn't clip behind notch.
7. Mock data should include: id, title, summary, imageUrl, source, time, category.
universal_guidelines: Avoid generic 'flat' design. Use subtle borders (width: 0.5, color: rgba(255,255,255,0.1)) to define edges in the dark.
Typography: Use `letterSpacing` for headings (tight: -0.5) and tags (wide: 1.0).
Motion: Every press must have feedback (opacity dip or scale down).
No loading spinners. Use skeleton loaders with shimmering gradients.
Contrast: Ensure text on images has a strong gradient scrim behind it.
NEVER use `alert()` for errors. Use a custom toast or snackbar overlay.
